svg.title: Manohar Eldhandi - Software Engineer portfolio board
svg.desc: A static midnight portfolio board with a thin gold border, four silver screws, tape-style links, and consistently framed sections for projects, skills, experience, competitive programming, community work, and contact information.

text.tspan: I build backend services and AI-assisted workflows, and I like being able to trace what happened
from the first request to the final result. I care about dependable releases and AI that takes
repetitive work off people’s plates without becoming a black box.

g.text: Pickup timing rarely matches a customer’s live arrival.
Designed route and fulfillment logic, secure multi-role APIs,
payment states, catalog search, and admin workflows.
Java 17 · Spring Boot · React · MySQL · Kafka · Docker
Job discovery is fragmented and personal data is sensitive.
Built five ATS connectors, evidence-backed scoring and materials,
privacy gates, and browser dry runs that stop for human review.
Node.js · LLM Gateway · Playwright · Python · CLI
A notebook score is not enough for traceable predictions.
Trained a voting ensemble and served it through authenticated
Django APIs with stored, reviewable inference results.
MCP · RAG · LangGraph · LLM APIs · Retrieval
Java · Python · Spring Boot · Node.js · Django
MySQL · Kafka · Docker · AWS · GitHub Actions · Linux
Databases, messaging, containers, automated builds, and practical cloud operations.
Internal AI security-compliance tooling used across four product teams.
Backend services · MCP/RAG · auditability · release automation
Mentored 150+ students through structured problem-solving practice.
CMR Institute of Technology · JNTU Hyderabad

a.text: Structured DSA practice that is easier to follow

g.text: I’m currently exploring AI Engineer and Backend
I’m particularly interested in teams based in Hyderabad or Bangalore,
and I’m also open to remote roles in India. If my background could
be useful to your team, I’d be glad to connect.
